g.text: Account Soft Delete, Recovery, and Grace Period Expiry
At least one channel must be authenticated
createOperation(initiator, targets, channels, Write, pre=Active, post=GracePeriodState)
Recovery requires both authenticated and encrypted channel
createOperation(initiator, targets, channels, Admin, pre=GracePeriodState, post=RecoveredState)
Transition from GracePeriodState to PostDone (permanent deletion)
createOperation(system, targets, channels, Admin, pre=GracePeriodState, post=PostDone)
